perturbation.original_text: Consultant will make all best efforts to conduct the following services in the time stated: Day 1: Concept generation for overall brand strategy ideation. Create plan for concept launch. Review all Giggles IP for use in future plans. Begin grass-roots campaign and social media buzz regarding the brand, and its existence as a public company to increase SH awareness. "Getting the story out" May: Launch overall concept implementation from Characters development for in-house programming, live shows, TV show, books, product including apparel and toys, gadgets. "getting ready" June: Introduction of POSSIBLE key financial partners and brand like partners to align with brand. Aside from raising awareness for the brand, which should already show appreciable increase in stock price, we will procure individual investors who desire to be part of Giggle and Hugs in partnership alignments.
perturbation.changed_text: Consultant will make all best efforts to conduct the following services in the time stated: Day 1: Concept generation for overall brand strategy ideation. Create plan for concept launch. Review all Giggles IP for use in future plans. Begin grass-roots campaign and social media buzz regarding the brand, and its existence as a public company to increase SH awareness. "Getting the story out" May: Launch overall concept implementation from Characters development for in-house programming, live shows, TV show, books, product including apparel and toys, gadgets. "getting ready" June: Introduction of key financial partners and brand like partners to align with brand. We will procure individual investors who desire to be part of Giggle and Hugs in partnership alignments.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by removing 'POSSIBLE' before "key financial partners" in the June timeline. This suggests a guaranteed introduction, conflicting with the 'best efforts' clause at the start of the paragraph and creating uncertainty about the consultant's obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Consultant shall use all best efforts to provide services including the following: ● Capital ○ Introduction to key investors. ○ Introduction to strategic partners ○ Introduction to celebrity endorsement and involvement, including but not limited to celebrity investors. ● Branding ○ Concept generation for overall brand strategy and market launch. ○ Facilitate and help structure strategic relationships partnerships with key influencers and celebrities and their children in various major markets, including NY and Los Angeles. ● Marketing ○ Public relations and marketing services, including grass-roots campaign, social media, local and national TV interviews and shows, local and national newspaper and magazine exposure and interviews, investor relations and shareholder awareness. ○ Expansion of brand awareness through creating and managing social media alliances with mommy bloggers and studios to start using location/possible tie-ins to national and local events, including Super Saturday LA, Super Saturday Hamptons, etc. ○ Solicit Advertising and partnership opportunities with consultants current and future corporate clients ○ Introduction of company to NY market with pop-up or take over existing play space and brand Company to the NY market. ○ Reach out to mall partners in partnership with the Company. Utilizing the Company's existing mall relationships and current offers. ● Licensing and Merchandising ○ Review all of Company's intellectual property for use in future plans, not including legal work ○ Facilitate and help structure strategic partnerships ○ with distribution partners, publishing partners, advertising partners, retail partners, licensing partners, etc. ○ Facilitate and help structure strategic relationship with merchandising and manufacturing partners, such as Hasbro or Mattel, etc. ○ Facilitate and help structure strategic relationship with merchandise partners for children's clothing line, frozen food line, toys and games, etc. ○ Create and begin 2017 roll out plan including product placement and further expansion of retail locations. 1 ● Entertainment ○ Consultant will facilitate and structure strategic relationships with publishing companies for Children's books, live news shows, TV show, entertainment shows, movies, and branding, etc. ○ Launch overall concept implementation from Characters development for in-house programming, live shows, TV show, books, product including apparel and toys, gadgets. ● Food and Beverage ○ Consultant will facilitate and structure strategic relationships with frozen and fresh food manufacturing and delivering companies, such as the idea of the "brought to home" meals with companies such as Blue Apron for kids meals. ○ Use best efforts to create brand partnerships and other strategic relationships described above. "Best efforts" means that degree of effort which would be reasonable for a person under similar circumstances.
perturbation.justification: The original text included 'POSSIBLE' before 'key financial partners,' indicating an uncertain or potential introduction. The changed text removes 'POSSIBLE,' suggesting a guaranteed introduction of key financial partners in June. This creates a conflict with the 'best efforts' clause, as a guaranteed introduction would exceed the scope of 'best efforts.' The contradicted text reinforces the 'best efforts' requirement for 'Introduction to key investors' and other related services, which is undermined by the changed text's implication of a guaranteed introduction.

perturbation.original_text: Either party may terminate this agreement after 3 years following the effective date.
perturbation.changed_text: Either party may terminate this agreement after 1 year following the effective date.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by altering the termination clause from '3 years' to '1 year'. This directly conflicts with the statement later in section 3(a)(3) that allows termination if milestones are not met within 12 months, because this clause would allow for termination after 12 months, regardless of milestone achievement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (3) By the Company, at its option, if at least two Milestones (excluding Milestones 1) are not achieved within 12 months from the Effective Date.
perturbation.justification: The changed text reduces the termination period from 3 years to 1 year. This directly contradicts section 3(a)(3), which allows termination if milestones aren't met within 12 months. The contradiction arises because the changed text permits termination after only one year regardless of milestone achievement, while 3(a)(3) ties termination to milestone completion within the same 12-month timeframe. The changed text therefore makes 3(a)(3) potentially redundant.

perturbation.original_text: The parties acknowledge and agree that their remedy (ies) at law for a breach or threatened breach of any of the provisions of this Agreement would be inadequate, and the breach shall be per se deemed as causing irreparable harm to the non-breaching party. In recognition of this fact in the event of a breach or threatened breach of any of the provisions of this Agreement, the Parties agree that, in addition to any remedy at law available, including, but not limited to monetary damages, the Parties, without posting any bond, shall be entitled to obtain equitable relief in the form of specific performance, temporary restraining order, temporary or permanent injunction or any other equitable remedy which may then be available to the non-breaching Party.
perturbation.changed_text: The parties acknowledge and agree that their remedy (ies) at law for a breach or threatened breach of any of the provisions of this Agreement would be adequate. In the event of a breach or threatened breach of any of the provisions of this Agreement, the Parties agree that their sole remedy at law available will be monetary damages.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by stating that monetary damages are the *sole* remedy available, conflicting with the original text that acknowledges legal remedies are inadequate and allows for equitable relief like specific performance. The original text also states irreparable harm is caused, but that has been omitted.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The parties acknowledge and agree that their remedy (ies) at law for a breach or threatened breach of any of the provisions of this Agreement would be adequate. In the event of a breach or threatened breach of any of the provisions of this Agreement, the Parties agree that their sole remedy at law available will be monetary damages.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that monetary damages are the *sole* remedy available for a breach, contradicting the original text (and now the contradicted text, since they are the same) which implies equitable remedies are also available. This constitutes a strong in-text contradiction because it fundamentally alters the remedies available to the parties, potentially impacting enforceability and causing confusion.
